title: MA2H Presence (v0.4)
description: Body of GET /v1/agents/{agent_id}/presence (spec §15). A derived, best-effort reachability signal for an agent:<id>, from its existing poll/long-poll/SSE activity. Owner-only: readable only by the human whose account the agent belongs to; a non-owned agent reads as `unknown`.

state.description: online: now - last_seen <= freshness window; offline: seen but stale; unknown: never seen (distinct from offline).

last_seen.description: Most recent authenticated poll/subscription activity. Present iff state is online/offline; absent for `unknown`.

freshness_seconds.description: The window after which last_seen reads `offline` (advertised as capability presence.freshness_seconds).
